author: National Geographic YouTube
text:
Exploring the Magic of India with David Blaine (Full Episode) | Do Not Attempt | National Geographic
David Blaine journeys to India, the historic birthplace of magic, in this full episode of David Blaine: Do Not Attempt from National Geographic. In this episode, the world-renowned magician and mentalist explores belief and willpower through the lens of magic. He meets magician and illusionist Karan Singh, who takes David on a tour of Jaipur to learn about the history of street magic. In Kurukshetra, Delhi, and beyond, he meets amazing performers with skills not found anywhere else on Earth. 

David Blaine Do Not Attempt | S1, E3

About National Geographic:
National Geographic is the world's premium destination for critically acclaimed storytelling around science and exploration. Discover amazing wildlife, ancient civilizations, hidden worlds, and the incredible wonders of our Earth. Through world-class scientists, photographers, journalists, and filmmakers, Nat Geo inspires fans of all ages to connect with, explore, and care about the world.
